steps.t: The entrance lies somewhere in Nud-melek, south-east of the Twenty-first Hall, perhaps the Second Hall. Geirfast has asked you to find the entrance to…
Geirfast is at the Twenty-first Hall, north-west of the Second Hall. You should return to Geirfast to tell him where the chamber is.
Geirfast is at the Twenty-first Hall. You should return at once to Geirfast.
Lenglammel is encamped at the Shadowed Refuge. Geirfast suggested you speak with the Elf Lenglammel.
